module.name: supplier
module.spec: A Supplier has three fields: Name (string), Contact (string), and ItemsSupplied (a slice of item names that this supplier provides). Suppliers are identified by Name for lookups and deduplication. See storage for persistence.

AddSupplier registers a new supplier. If a supplier with the same Name already exists, a duplicate error is returned. The supplier's ItemsSupplied list must be non-empty (a supplier with no items is rejected). The store is persisted after adding.

ListSuppliers returns all suppliers sorted alphabetically by Name. Each supplier's ItemsSupplied list is sorted alphabetically within the supplier entry. See supplier_report which consumes this output.
GetSupplier returns the supplier with the given Name. If not found, a NotFound error is returned. Lookup is case-sensitive.
